name: Kai's Spinach Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove stems from spinach and wash. Cut onions and sauté in water until tender.
2. Wash and slice mushrooms. Add to the onions and cook until all water evaporates.
3. Transfer onions and mushrooms to a large bowl. Sauté spinach in water, tossing frequently, until all liquid evaporates.
4. Mix onions/mushrooms and spinach together in the bowl, ensuring even distribution of onions and mushrooms throughout the spinach.
5. Beat egg whites lightly. Add grated cheese to the egg mixture and mix thoroughly.
6. Add the spinach mixture to the egg and cheese mixture and stir until well combined.
CRUST:
1. Use a rectangular glass baking dish, sprayed lightly with Pam.
2. Quickly layer 5-7 sheets of phyllo dough on the bottom of the dish, spraying each layer lightly with Pam.
3. Spread half of the spinach mixture over the phyllo layers.
4. Add another 5-7 sheets of phyllo and continue with the remaining spinach mixture.
5. Top with 10 to 15 sheets of phyllo, spraying lightly between each layer.
6. Trim any excess dough around the edges.
7. Moisten fingertips and seal the edges like a normal pie crust.
8. Spray the top lightly with Pam.
9. Using a sharp knife, cut through the top layer in the desired pattern (e.g., rectangular or diamond shapes).
10. Bake at 400-425°F for 30 minutes.
Note: Use healthy choice fat-free grated cheeses made from skim milk for best results.
